case_title: DISCOVER BANK VS. LEONARD LACAYO et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10

ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK AS TO DEFENDANT LACAYO, LEONARD DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-09-2013
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK AS TO DEFENDANT LACAYO, LEONARD
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $449.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT LACAYO, LEONARD

SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK AS TO DEFENDANT LACAYO, LEONARD
